title: Undead and Unluck
overview: An "Undead" man with an immortal body suddenly appears in front of Fuko with the power of "Unluck".

title: Union
overview: Andy makes a move on Fuko thinking an even greater unluck will happen.

title: How to Use My Unluck
overview: A Union member will be on the move for a UMA investigation. Andy and Fuko head towards Lake Baikal!

title: Do You Love the Change in Me?
overview: Gena thinks Fuko has stolen her long crush Andy and shows emotions of rivalry out of jealousy.

title: United We Negate
overview: Andy and Fuko are taken to the Roundtable where Union members await. Apocalypse delivers new quests.

title: Spoil
overview: Based on Union agent reports, the town of Longing had the UMA Spoil and zombies they've created.

title: Dream
overview: Fuko learns from the kids in the shelter about town's situation. Andy's gang join the zombie battle.

title: Victhor
overview: Spoil transitions to Phase 2, firing a decomposition laser for anything that gets away.

title: Return
overview: Victor is Andy's other face that shows up when the Card on his forehead is removed.

title: Result
overview: Apocalypse reads out the quest results. Failure of the sixth quest adds the UMA Galaxy as a penalty.

title: Rio de Janeiro
overview: The Negator Unrepair found near a black market auction, so Andy and company head over to the venue.

title: Activate
overview: The Union and the Negator Hunters infiltrated the black market auction.

title: Tatiana
overview: While Tatiana fights members of the Negator Hunters, she receives a report that Fuko was wounded by Unrepair. Tatiana unleashes her powers in order to save Fuko!

title: Crimson Bullet
overview: A huge explosion occurs and sends Andy and company up into the air. They find Rip among the rubble.

title: Under
overview: Fuko and Andy head over to right outside Chikara's school to hear his reply about joining the Union.

title: Revolution
overview: Apocalypse reads out the quests that have the 100th penalty on the line.

title: Outsmart
overview: To regain the Roundtable, the Union commences an operation with Andy and Fuko as central members.

title: Cry for the Moon
overview: The Union regains control of Apocalypse, but the Roundtable has been seized.

title: Undead + Unluck
overview: Fuko's bible in life, “To You, From Me”, may possibly be a story drawn out by an Artifact.

title: Anno Un
overview: Andy and Fuko are on alert and wait for Anno Un on a bench at Stanley Park in Canada.

title: Memento Mori
overview: Andy becomes a book thanks to Autumn's claw that Anno Un materialized.

title: Profile
overview: The next place Fuko arrives in the journey to learn more about Andy is Victor's memories.

title: A Story I Won't See Coming
overview: Anno Un's true self is Akira Kuno. Young Akira came across the Artifact, "G-Liner."

title: To You, From Me
overview: Andy's group and Rip's group collide in the fight with Autumn.
